---
title: "Lecture 33 Quiz: Spring Core Basics & Dependency Injection"
jupyter: julia-1.12
---

::: {.callout-note}
Review before quiz:
[Lectures](/lectures/lecture-33.qmd) | [Week 11 Content](/content/week-11.qmd) | [Lab 8](/labs/lab-08.qmd)
:::

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
using QuizQuestions
```

## Lecture 33 Self-Check

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. The application calls a library to get what it needs", "B. The framework controls object creation and injects dependencies into your code", "C. The developer manually instantiates all objects with `new`", "D. The database manages Java object creation automatically"]
question = "Question 1: What does Inversion of Control (IoC) mean in Spring?"
answer = 2
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. Constructor injection", "B. Setter injection", "C. Field injection", "D. All three are equally preferred"]
question = "Question 2: Which injection style is recommended for mandatory dependencies because it supports immutable `final` fields?"
answer = 1
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. `BeanFactory` eagerly initialises all beans at startup; `ApplicationContext` is lazy", "B. `ApplicationContext` eagerly initialises beans and adds event publishing, i18n, and annotation support", "C. They are identical — `ApplicationContext` is just a renamed alias", "D. `BeanFactory` supports AOP; `ApplicationContext` does not"]
question = "Question 3: What is a key difference between `ApplicationContext` and `BeanFactory`?"
answer = 2
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. `@Configuration` + `@Bean` methods in a Java class", "B. `<bean>` declarations in an XML file", "C. `@Component` + `@Autowired` on classes", "D. `@SpringBootApplication` on the main class"]
question = "Question 4: Which approach is Java Config style for defining Spring beans?"
answer = 1
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```

```{julia cache=true}
#| echo: false
choices = ["A. It causes a NullPointerException at deploy time", "B. It increases performance significantly", "C. Fields cannot be `final`, dependencies are hidden, and the class is hard to unit test without Spring", "D. Spring automatically converts field injection to constructor injection at runtime"]
question = "Question 5: Why is field injection (`@Autowired` directly on a field) discouraged in production code?"
answer = 3
radioq(choices, answer; label=question, keep_order=true)
```
